topic_text: Resolved: If some birds can fly and penguins are birds, then penguins can fly.
Resolved: If it is raining then the ground is wet; the ground is wet, therefore it is raining.
Resolved: The number of people who hold a belief is sufficient to determine whether that belief is true.
Resolved: Humans only use 10 percent of their brains.
Resolved: Antibiotics are effective against viral infections such as the common cold.
